name: Sheridan Community
description_short: Sheridan Community Federal Credit Union is a Wyoming-based credit union offering auto loans, RV financing, mortgages, and savings accounts with competitive rates.
description_long:
Sheridan Community Federal Credit Union operates as a member-owned financial institution serving the Sheridan, Wyoming community. The credit union emphasizes traditional hometown banking with modern digital services, positioning itself as an alternative to large national banks.

The institution offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including vehicle financing (auto, RV, motorcycle, ATV, snowmachine, and side-by-side loans), personal loans, vacation loans, mortgage loans, and deposit accounts (checking, savings, and certificates of deposit). Members can access digital banking through online and mobile platforms, utilize Zelle for money transfers, and leverage phone banking services. The credit union also provides debit ATM cards and credit cards to its members.

Sheridan Community Federal Credit Union differentiates itself through locally-focused service, emphasizing competitive rates in the Sheridan area market and personalized attention from named loan officers (Shayne Belt, NMLS #2528443, and Brian Knott, NMLS #2627665). The institution advertises some of the lowest loan rates available locally and highlights interest-bearing savings products. Their marketing emphasizes the "credit union difference" as a member-owned alternative to traditional banking.

The credit union is a legitimate federally-chartered institution with routing number 302386943. However, the website provides limited information about membership eligibility, fee structures, or detailed loan terms beyond advertised rates. Potential members should contact the institution directly to understand full membership requirements and complete product details.
services: Motorcycle, ATV, snowmachine, and side-by-side loans
Personal loans and lines of credit
Checking accounts with debit ATM cards
Phone banking and Zelle money transfer service
pros: Auto loan rates as low as 4.45% APR for new cars and 4.75% APR for used cars
Certificate of Deposit rates as high as 3.25% APY
Multiple vehicle loan options including RV, motorcycle, ATV, and snowmachine financing
Digital banking services including online banking, mobile banking, and Zelle money transfers
Personalized loan officer relationships with named contacts and NMLS numbers
Local, community-focused service model emphasizing hometown banking values
Mortgage lending services for home purchase and refinance
cons: Limited geographic reach—appears to serve primarily Sheridan, Wyoming area only
Website lacks detailed information on membership eligibility requirements and restrictions
No information provided on monthly fees, minimum balances, or account maintenance costs
Motorcycle loan rates (7.25% APR) are significantly higher than auto loan rates
Limited transparency on loan approval process and required documentation
best_for: Wyoming residents in the Sheridan area seeking vehicle financing with competitive rates
Credit union members preferring member-owned institutions over large national banks
Savers looking for higher-yield certificates of deposit compared to traditional banks
diagnosis: Sheridan Community Federal Credit Union is best for Wyoming residents in the Sheridan area seeking competitive vehicle financing and deposit products from a member-owned institution. The main caveat is that membership and service appear to be geographically limited to the Sheridan community, and the website lacks transparency on membership eligibility, account fees, and detailed loan terms beyond advertised rates.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
